summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Top-Up Session Coupon Integration. All 12 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified - coupon toggle, input, apply, discount display, and removal all working correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_topup_coupon.py - Created new test file for top-up coupon integration
seed_data_creation: Used existing TOPUP20 coupon for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top-up coupon integration fully tested. Backend: POST /api/payments/topup/create-order accepts optional coupon_discount_id, validates coupon for coaching type, applies discount after volume discount, records usage on payment verification. Frontend: CoachingPage.jsx has coupon toggle, input field, apply button, discount display, and removal functionality in the top-up modal.

backend_apis.GET /api/payments/topup/pricing: Returns base price and discount tiers
backend_apis.GET /api/payments/topup/pricing?session_: Returns calculated pricing for N sessions
backend_apis.POST /api/payments/topup/verify: Verifies payment and records coupon usage

frontend_ui.purchase_button: Shows updated total with coupon discount

test_scenarios_covered: Top-up pricing endpoint returns correct data
Create order with invalid coupon (gracefully ignored)
Verify endpoint exists and handles requests
